modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need a secure folder created in Cognos for reports.

full_description_text:  
I’m hoping to get a secure folder set up in Cognos. I want to have some reports saved there so I can run them whenever I need. It would really help me out if this could be done soon, as I rely on these reports for my work.
short_description: Need a secure folder created in Cognos for reports.
description: I’m hoping to get a secure folder set up in Cognos. I want to have some reports saved there so I can run them whenever I need. It would really help me out if this could be done soon, as I rely on these reports for my work.
